name: Buttermilk Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add butter and currants; mix with your hands until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in buttermilk and orange rind until just combined.
5. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and shape into a 1-inch thick round.
6. Cut the scones into wedges if desired.
7. Bake for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow to cool on a wire rack before serving.
